title: M2A TUI Power Navigation And M2B Adapter Commit Pipeline
objective: Advance M2A and M2B with a concrete implementation slice: expose Graph Lab and a minimal Command Deck in the TUI, and add host-mediated ObjectBatch commit with plugin run audit and CLI coverage.

must_have: Graph Lab is visible as a first-class workspace lens with a shortcut and tests
Command Deck minimal overlay previews common commands and current object actions
TUI command/status area exposes breadcrumbs and status chips
Plugin host can commit validated ObjectBatch objects and edges transactionally
Plugin CLI exposes commit and fixture-run commands with JSON output
Plugin commit records plugin run audit and contribution counts
README documents M2A/M2B usage and limitations

tasks.title: Minimal Command Deck And TUI Polish
Plugin CLI Commit And Run Commands

verification: cargo run -p revdeck-cli -- plugin commit <project> fixtures/plugins/valid-minimal
cargo run -p revdeck-cli -- plugin run <project> fixtures/plugins/valid-minimal --commit
